title: Chemical Life
description: GPU-accelerated Gray-Scott reaction diffusion — draw on a living canvas and watch alien organisms grow in real time.
concept: Two virtual chemicals (A and B) react and diffuse across a WebGL canvas. Different feed and kill rate parameters unlock radically different emergent behaviors: pulsing coral branches, drifting spots, winding stripes, spiral waves, and worm-like tangles. Every pattern is a solution to the same two differential equations, just at different parameter points in the Gray-Scott space. Draw with your cursor or finger to inject chemical B and seed new life anywhere on the field.

interaction.mouse: Move cursor to watch patterns evolve; hold to paint chemical B and seed new growth
interaction.click: Click and drag to inject catalyst — patterns spread from your touch
interaction.touch: Tap and drag on mobile for full multi-touch seeding support
